rulings.Case Title: ADA WU et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 13, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant has failed to shift the summary judgment burden. The undisputed evidence shows that there is a triable issue of fact as to whether defendant violated its common carrier duty. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LEROY GATLIN et al VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 13, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID BELL, SHARON BELL, CHRISTINE BELL, MARY BELL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' demurrer to the 1st cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must separate out the negligent hiring claim. Defendant's demurrer to the 3rd-6th causes of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead specifics of the contract or attach a copy to the amended complaint. Defendant's demurrer to the 8th cause of action for nuisance is sustained without leave to amend as it is duplicative of the negligence claim. Defendant's demurrer to the 9th cause of action for violation of the rent ordinance is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to show that defendant acted willfully in bad faith. Defendant's demurrer to the 10th cause of action for I.I.E.D. is sustainted with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts susfficient to support this cause of action. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LEROY GATLIN et al VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 13, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID BELL, SHARON BELL, CHRISTINE BELL, MARY BELL MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' motion to strike the punitive damages claims is granted with leave to amend. Defendants' motion to strike the allegations regarding violation of the rent ordinance is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege facts to show defendant acted willfully in bad faith. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LEROY GATLIN et al VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 13, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT CORNELY COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's motion to strike the punitive damages claim is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to support this claim. Defendant's motion to strike the prayer for attorney fees, restitution of rent and the treble damages is granted as to this defendant. Defendant's motion to strike the prejudgment interest claim is granted without leave to amend. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LEROY GATLIN et al VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 13, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT CORNELY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's demuurrer to the 2nd cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff has made reference to specific acts as to specific defendants that are not inconsistent or vague. Defendant's demurrer to the 10th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to support the required elements for this cause of action. Defendant's demurrer to the 11th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend as to this defendant. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINE CHANG VS. JANE L. O'HARA GAMP
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
